reference: Hi doctor. My name is Lingesh. I am seventeen. I am having a problem. I have gynecomastia. I don’t know whether it can be removed by doing exercise or by undergoing surgery. Besides that, I am not good at doing weightlifting, so I am considering attending gym classes. What should I do, go to the gym or undergo surgery?
text: Hi, doctor. My name is Lingesh. I am 17. I am having a problem. I have gynocomastia. I don't know whether it can be removed by doing exercise or by undergoing surgery. Besides that, I am not good at doing weightlifting, so I am considering attending gym classes. What should I do? Go to the gym or undergo surgery?
